content.problemStatement:
You have been given an integer KKK and four arrays AAA, BBB, CCC, and DDD with sizes SAS_ASAБқ‹, SBS_BSBБқ‹, SCS_CSCБқ‹ and SDS_DSDБқ‹ respectively.

Follow the given steps:


Pick four indices xxx, yyy, zzz, and www from arrays AAA, BBB, CCC, and DDD respectively. Note that (1Б‰¤xБ‰¤SA)(1 \le x \le S_A)(1Б‰¤xБ‰¤SAБқ‹), (1Б‰¤yБ‰¤SB)(1 \le y \le S_B)(1Б‰¤yБ‰¤SBБқ‹), (1Б‰¤zБ‰¤SC)(1 \le z \le S_C)(1Б‰¤zБ‰¤SCБқ‹) and (1Б‰¤wБ‰¤SD)(1 \le w \le S_D)(1Б‰¤wБ‰¤SDБқ‹).
There are in total SAц—SBц—SCц—SDS_A\times S_B\times S_C\times S_DSAБқ‹ц—SBБқ‹ц—SCБқ‹ц—SDБқ‹ ways to do the above step. For each way, write down the value of (Ax+By)ц—(Cz+Dw)(A_x + B_y) \times (C_z + D_w)(AxБқ‹+ByБқ‹)ц—(CzБқ‹+DwБқ‹) on a board.
Sort all the numbers written on the board in **non-decreasing** order.
Find the KthK^{th}Kth element written on the board.


Input Format

First line contains five integers SAS_ASAБқ‹, SBS_BSBБқ‹, SCS_CSCБқ‹, SDS_DSDБқ‹ and KKK.
The second line contains SAS_ASAБқ‹ space-separated integers A1,A2,...,ASAA_1,A_2,...,A_{S_A}A1Бқ‹,A2Бқ‹,...,ASAБқ‹Бқ‹ denoting the array AAA.
The third line contains SBS_BSBБқ‹ space-separated integers B1,B2,...,BSBB_1,B_2,...,B_{S_B}B1Бқ‹,B2Бқ‹,...,BSBБқ‹Бқ‹ denoting the array BBB.
The fourth line contains SCS_CSCБқ‹ space-separated integers C1,C2,...,CSCC_1,C_2,...,C_{S_C}C1Бқ‹,C2Бқ‹,...,CSCБқ‹Бқ‹ denoting the array CCC.
The fifth line contains SDS_DSDБқ‹ space-separated integers D1,D2,...,DSDD_1,D_2,...,D_{S_D}D1Бқ‹,D2Бқ‹,...,DSDБқ‹Бқ‹ denoting the array DDD.


Output Format
For each test case, output the required number in a single line .

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
After sorting the numbers on the board are in the following order {8,8,10,10,12,15,16,16,20,20,20,25}\{8, 8, 10, 10, 12, 15, 16, 16, 20, 20, 20, 25\}{8,8,10,10,12,15,16,16,20,20,20,25}. So, the 10th10^{th}10th number is 202020.
